annotation-with-trailing.comment: Single-line annotation `:: label [params] :: <trailing>`. The label/params region is scoped as a tag (not prose), the trailing portion stays as prose so CSpell checks it.

annotation-marker.comment: Annotation header `:: label [params] ::`. Matches anywhere on a line (covers inline / mid-line occurrences too) so the label region is scoped as non-prose for spell-check skip.
annotation-marker.name: meta.tag.annotation.lex

annotation-close.comment: Annotation block closer `::` on its own indented line.
annotation-close.name: meta.tag.annotation.close.lex

inline-math.comment: Lex math span: `#…#` per the grammar (`math_span: /#[^#\n]+#/`).
inline-math.name: markup.inline.math.lex
